# MTGTop8 Fixture Notes

Date recorded: 2026-06-21

These fixtures are local HTML samples for the MTGTop8 adapter. They cover event metadata, deck metadata, mainboard/sideboard card rows, missing optional commander/pilot fields, missing required identity fields, unavailable decklists, malformed HTML, and raw HTML preservation.

They are not copied third-party scraper code and are not live site captures. Refresh manually with captured MTGTop8 pages before relying on MTGTop8 for broad historical backfill.
